# Sommelier Arena тАФ Copilot Instructions

Sommelier Arena is a real-time blind wine tasting quiz game (Kahoot-style). A host creates a session and sets up wines with questions; participants join with a 4-digit code, answer questions live, and compete on a leaderboard.

## Monorepo layout

| Directory | Role | Port |
|-----------|------|------|
| `back/` | NestJS backend тАФ all game state, Socket.IO gateway | 3001 |
| `front/` | Astro (static) + React islands + Zustand stores | 3000 |
| `docs-site/` | Docusaurus documentation site | 3002 |
| `e2e/` | Playwright E2E tests (run against Docker stack) | тАФ |

## Commands

### Backend (`back/`)
```bash
npm run start:dev        # watch mode
npm test                 # run all Jest tests
npm run test:cov         # Jest with coverage report
npx jest src/__tests__/game.service.spec.ts  # single test file
npm run build            # compile to dist/
```

### Frontend (`front/`)
```bash
npm run dev              # Astro dev server (defaults to port 4321 тАФ not 3000)
npm run build            # static build
```

### Full stack (Docker тАФ required for E2E)
```bash
docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d    # from repo root (uses docker-compose v2 CLI)
docker-compose down
```

> **Note**: on this machine `docker compose` (space) is not available тАФ use `docker-compose` (hyphen).

### E2E (`e2e/`)
```bash
# Requires Docker stack running first
npm test                                          # all tests, Chromium
npx playwright test tests/home.spec.ts            # single file
npx playwright test --project=chromium            # single browser
npm run test:ui                                   # interactive UI mode
```

## Architecture

### Backend
All game state lives in-memory inside `GameService` тАФ there is no database. Sessions are lost on restart. The `GameGateway` is transport-only: it delegates every business decision to `GameService` and `TimerService`. Never put business logic in the gateway.

State machine (`SessionPhase`):
```
waiting тЖТ question_open тЖФ question_paused тЖТ question_revealed тЖТ round_leaderboard тЖТ (next round or ended)
```

Key limits: 4-digit numeric session codes, max 10 participants, 60 s per question, 100 pts for correct / 0 for wrong, first-tap lock (answers cannot be changed).

### Frontend
Astro pages (`/`, `/host`, `/play`) are static shells. All interactivity runs in React components hydrated with `client:only="react"`. Two Zustand stores тАФ `hostStore` and `participantStore` тАФ own all client-side state and mirror the backend phase machine:

- Host phases: `setup тЖТ lobby тЖТ question тЖТ revealed тЖТ roundLeaderboard тЖТ finalLeaderboard`
- Participant phases: `join тЖТ lobby тЖТ question тЖТ revealed тЖТ roundLeaderboard тЖТ finalLeaderboard тЖТ ended`

Socket hooks (`useHostSocket`, `useParticipantSocket`) wire socket events to store actions. The singleton socket (`src/lib/socket.ts`) uses `autoConnect: false` and connects on demand.

### Networking
- **Docker**: nginx at port 3000 (and port 80) proxies `/socket.io/` to `back:3001`. The socket connects with no explicit URL (same-origin). Port 80 is also bound so that browsers with a cached redirect to `http://localhost/host/` still land on the correct app.
- **Local dev**: set `PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3001` in `front/.env`; run `back` and `front` independently.

### Shared types
`front/src/types/events.ts` manually mirrors the payload interfaces exported from `back/src/game/game.service.ts`. Keep both in sync when changing event shapes.

## Playwright MCP

`.vscode/mcp.json` configures the `@playwright/mcp` server. With the Docker stack running (`docker-compose up -d`), Copilot can use Playwright tools to navigate `http://localhost:3000`, interact with the host/participant UI, and observe real Socket.IO behaviour without a separate test run.

## Key conventions

- **Separation of concerns**: `GameGateway` = transport; `GameService` = all rules; `TimerService` = timer lifecycle. Do not blur these boundaries.
- **Option positions**: correct answer is stored as `position: 1` internally; options are sent to clients without the `correct` flag тАФ clients learn the correct `optionId` only on `game:answer_revealed`.
- **Participant identity**: keyed by `socketId`, not by pseudonym. Pseudonyms are auto-generated by `PseudonymService` and are unique within a session.
- **Backend test layout**: unit/integration specs live in `back/src/__tests__/`. `game.service.spec.ts`, `timer.service.spec.ts`, and `pseudonym.service.spec.ts` are pure unit tests (no NestJS bootstrap). `game.integration.spec.ts` boots the full `AppModule` with a real HTTP+WS server тАФ add new integration tests there, reuse the existing `waitFor<T>(socket, event)` and `whenConnected(socket)` helpers defined at the top of that file. Target тЙе 80% coverage.
- **Session DTO shape**: the `create_session` event expects `{ wines: [{ name, questions: [{ category, correctAnswer, distractors: [string, string, string] }] }] }`. Valid `category` values: `color`, `country`, `grape_variety`, `vintage_year`.
- **Frontend component naming**: host-side components are prefixed `Host*` (e.g. `HostApp`, `HostLobby`, `HostQuestion`); participant-side use `Participant*` or descriptive names; shared UI lives in `components/common/`.
- **E2E test tags**: tests are tagged `@smoke`, `@full`, or `@mobile`. Firefox/WebKit run `@smoke|@full`; mobile browsers run `@smoke|@mobile`; mobile-firefox runs `@smoke` only. Tag new tests appropriately.
- **E2E workers**: Playwright is configured with `workers: 1` (sequential) because tests share real Socket.IO server state. Do not enable parallelism.
- **No linter is configured** for this project тАФ there is no `eslint` or `prettier` script to run.
